calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Alisa Kim, Esq. 415-826-9160 Plaintiff Unifund.
Claudia Siem 415-425-7923 Defendant in Pro Per, appears telephonically through the Court's landline.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF CLAUDIA SIEM.

Denied in Part. Claudia Siem is to pay $50 dollars per pay period for payment of the debt.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Continued to March 13, 2018 at 9:30 am. The Court to send notice. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)

PREVIOUSLY ON FEB. 8, 2018; NOTE: Off the record, the court permits Ms. Claudia Siem to appear by telephone on her next court hearing in Dept. 302. Ms. Siem may call Dept. 302 directly at 415.551.3723.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alisa J. Kim, Esq., T:510.736.6293, specially appearing for the plaintiff/moving party;
Claudia Siem, T:415.425.7923, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: Ms. Claudia Siem was sworn and examined by the Court and plaintiff's counsel re: the source of the money in the levied account. After hearing, the Court rules on PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION as follows:

Defendant/judgment debtor CLAUDIA SIEM'S Claim of Exemption is GRANTED. The levying officer is directed to release any funds levied to the judgment debtor. The Court is to prepare and serve the Order Determining Claim Of Exemption on all parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

NOTE: Off the record, the court permits Ms. Claudia Siem to appear by telephone on her next court hearing in Dept. 302. Ms. Siem may call Dept. 302 directly at 415.551.3723.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-19-2018 Continued To Feb-08-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR PARTNERS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is Continued to February 8, 2018 at 9:30 am IN dEPARTMENT 302 per defendant's request.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840, mlyon@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RBU)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVE LEVY, APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY COURT CALL;
CLAUDIA A. SIEM, TEL. NO. 1-415-425-7923, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. DEFENDANT CLAUDIA A. SIEM'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
is granted in part. The levying officer is directed to release funds to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment in the amount of $4,569.00. The levying officer is directed to release funds held to the defendant in excess of the amount of $4,569.00.
ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/HK
